title: Performing duties of both offices; bond
doc_html:
§1665.  Performing duties of both offices; bond

Whenever one person is elected to the offices of parish treasurer and clerk of the police jury he shall perform all of the services required of both officers and shall give the bond required of parish treasurers.
doc_text:
§1665.  Performing duties of both offices; bond
Whenever one person is elected to the offices of parish treasurer and clerk of the police jury he shall perform all of the services required of both officers and shall give the bond required of parish treasurers.
